title: teucrium rotundifolium subsp. granatense
intro: Teucrium rotundifolium subsp. granatense is a subspecies of the Teucrium rotundifolium plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Iberian Peninsula. This perennial herb is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Teucrium rotundifolium subsp. granatense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively in traditional medicine.
